Bash("C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import numpy as np
from optimizer.monte_carlo import trade_reshuffle, trade_skip

# Simulate realistic trade PnLs \(mix of winners and losers\)
np.random.seed\(42\)
pnls = np.concatenate\([
    np.random.uniform\(5, 50, 60\),    # 60 winners
    np.random.uniform\(-30, -5, 40\),  # 40 losers
]\)
np.random.shuffle\(pnls\)

print\(''=== Monte Carlo: Trade Reshuffling \(1000 iters\) ===''\)
r = trade_reshuffle\(pnls, n_iterations=1000\)
for k, v in r.items\(\):
    print\(f''  {k}: {v:.2f}'' if isinstance\(v, float\) else f''  {k}: {v}''\)

print\(''\\n=== Monte Carlo: Trade Skip 10% \(1000 iters\) ===''\)
s = trade_skip\(pnls, skip_pct=0.10, n_iterations=1000\)
for k, v in s.items\(\):
    print\(f''  {k}: {v:.2f}'' if isinstance\(v, float\) else f''  {k}: {v}''\)

print\(''\\nMonte Carlo smoke test PASSED''\)
")

import requests
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

base = ''https://api-contract.weex.com''
now = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
yesterday = now - timedelta\(hours=24\)
start_ms = int\(yesterday.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)
end_ms = int\(now.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)
old_ms = int\(\(now - timedelta\(hours=20\)\).timestamp\(\) * 1000\)

tests = [
    # Test startTime on /candles
    \(f''{base}/capi/v2/market/candles'', {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''startTime'': str\(start_ms\), ''endTime'': str\(end_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # Test startTime only
    \(f''{base}/capi/v2/market/candles'', {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''startTime'': str\(old_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # Test endTime only  
    \(f''{base}/capi/v2/market/candles'', {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(old_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # historyCandles with cmt_ format
    \(f''{base}/capi/v2/market/historyCandles'', {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(old_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # history-candles
    \(f''{base}/capi/v2/market/history-candles'', {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(old_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
]

for url, params in tests:
    try:
        resp = requests.get\(url, params=params, timeout=10\)
        data = resp.json\(\)
        if isinstance\(data, list\) and len\(data\) > 0:
            oldest = min\(int\(c[0]\) for c in data\)
            newest = max\(int\(c[0]\) for c in data\)
            odt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(oldest/1000, tz=timezone.utc\).strftime\(''%H:%M''\)
            ndt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(newest/1000, tz=timezone.utc\).strftime\(''%H:%M''\)
            print\(f''OK  {len\(data\)} candles [{odt}-{ndt}] <- {url.split\(""/""\)[-1]} {list\(params.keys\(\)\)}''\)
        elif isinstance\(data, dict\):
            print\(f''ERR code={data.get\(""code""\)} <- {url.split\(""/""\)[-1]} {list\(params.keys\(\)\)}''\)
        else:
            print\(f''EMPTY <- {url.split\(""/""\)[-1]} {list\(params.keys\(\)\)}''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''FAIL {e} <- {url.split\(""/""\)[-1]}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import requests, time
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

base = ''https://api-contract.weex.com/capi/v2/market/historyCandles''
now = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
end_ms = int\(now.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)

# Page 1: latest 100
p1 = requests.get\(base, params={''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(end_ms\), ''limit'': ''100''}, timeout=10\).json\(\)
if isinstance\(p1, list\) and len\(p1\) > 0:
    oldest1 = min\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p1\)
    newest1 = max\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p1\)
    dt1_old = datetime.fromtimestamp\(oldest1/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
    dt1_new = datetime.fromtimestamp\(newest1/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
    print\(f''Page 1: {len\(p1\)} candles, {dt1_old.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)} to {dt1_new.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)}''\)

    # Page 2: use oldest - 1 as cursor
    time.sleep\(0.3\)
    cursor = oldest1 - 1
    p2 = requests.get\(base, params={''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(cursor\), ''limit'': ''100''}, timeout=10\).json\(\)
    if isinstance\(p2, list\) and len\(p2\) > 0:
        oldest2 = min\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p2\)
        newest2 = max\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p2\)
        dt2_old = datetime.fromtimestamp\(oldest2/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
        dt2_new = datetime.fromtimestamp\(newest2/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
        overlap = len\(set\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p1\) & set\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p2\)\)
        print\(f''Page 2: {len\(p2\)} candles, {dt2_old.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)} to {dt2_new.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)}''\)
        print\(f''Overlap: {overlap} candles''\)
        print\(f''Gap: Page1 oldest={dt1_old.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)}, Page2 newest={dt2_new.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)}''\)
        
        # Page 3
        time.sleep\(0.3\)
        cursor3 = oldest2 - 1
        p3 = requests.get\(base, params={''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(cursor3\), ''limit'': ''100''}, timeout=10\).json\(\)
        if isinstance\(p3, list\) and len\(p3\) > 0:
            oldest3 = min\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p3\)
            dt3_old = datetime.fromtimestamp\(oldest3/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
            dt3_new = datetime.fromtimestamp\(max\(int\(c[0]\) for c in p3\)/1000, tz=timezone.utc\)
            print\(f''Page 3: {len\(p3\)} candles, {dt3_old.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)} to {dt3_new.strftime\(""%H:%M""\)}''\)
            print\(f''Total unique: ~{len\(p1\)+len\(p2\)+len\(p3\)} candles covering ~{\(newest1-oldest3\)/\(60*1000\):.0f} minutes''\)
    else:
        print\(f''Page 2 returned: {type\(p2\).__name__}''\)
else:
    print\(f''Page 1 failed: {type\(p1\).__name__}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

base_candles = ''https://api-contract.weex.com/capi/v2/market/candles''
base_history = ''https://api-contract.weex.com/capi/v2/market/historyCandles''

# Target: 6 hours ago
target = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\) - timedelta\(hours=6\)
target_ms = int\(target.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)
target_s = int\(target.timestamp\(\)\)

tests = [
    # endTime in seconds vs milliseconds
    \(''candles'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(target_s\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    \(''candles ms'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    \(''history s'', base_history, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(target_s\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    \(''history ms'', base_history, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''endTime'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # Try ''before'' and ''after'' params
    \(''candles before'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''before'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    \(''candles after'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''after'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # Try ''end'' param
    \(''candles end'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''end'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
    # Try startTime
    \(''candles startTime'', base_candles, {''symbol'': ''cmt_btcusdt'', ''granularity'': ''1m'', ''startTime'': str\(target_ms\), ''limit'': ''5''}\),
]

target_str = target.strftime\(''%H:%M''\)
print\(f''Target time: {target_str} UTC \(6h ago\)''\)
print\(\)

for name, url, params in tests:
    try:
        resp = requests.get\(url, params=params, timeout=10\)
        data = resp.json\(\)
        if isinstance\(data, list\) and len\(data\) > 0:
            newest = datetime.fromtimestamp\(max\(int\(c[0]\) for c in data\)/1000, tz=timezone.utc\).strftime\(''%H:%M''\)
            oldest = datetime.fromtimestamp\(min\(int\(c[0]\) for c in data\)/1000, tz=timezone.utc\).strftime\(''%H:%M''\)
            print\(f''{name:20s} -> {len\(data\)} candles [{oldest}-{newest}]  target={target_str}''\)
        elif isinstance\(data, dict\):
            print\(f''{name:20s} -> ERR code={data.get\(""code""\)}''\)
        else:
            print\(f''{name:20s} -> empty''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{name:20s} -> FAIL: {e}''\)
")

from data.fetcher import BybitFetcher
from signals.four_pillars import compute_signals
from engine.backtester import Backtester

fetcher = BybitFetcher\(cache_dir=''data/cache''\)
symbols = [''BTCUSDT'', ''ETHUSDT'', ''SOLUSDT'', ''MEMEUSDT'', ''RIVERUSDT'']

signal_params = {
    ''atr_length'': 14, ''cross_level'': 25, ''zone_level'': 30,
    ''stage_lookback'': 10, ''allow_b_trades'': True, ''allow_c_trades'': True,
    ''b_open_fresh'': True, ''cloud2_reentry'': True, ''reentry_lookback'': 10,
}
bt_params = {
    ''sl_mult'': 1.0, ''tp_mult'': 1.5, ''cooldown'': 3, ''b_open_fresh'': True,
    ''be_raise_amount'': 0, ''cost_per_side'': 6.0, ''rebate_pct'': 0.70,
    ''settlement_hour_utc'': 17,
}
bt_params_be = dict\(bt_params, be_raise_amount=2.0\)

print\(f''{''Symbol'':12s} {''Trades'':>6s} {''WR'':>6s} {''Exp'':>8s} {''P&L'':>10s} {''Comm'':>8s} {''LSG'':>5s} | {''Trades'':>6s} {''WR'':>6s} {''Exp'':>8s} {''P&L'':>10s} {''BE#'':>5s}''\)
print\(f''{'''':12s} {''--- No BE Raise ---'':^42s} | {''--- With BE +$2 ---'':^38s}''\)
print\(''-'' * 105\)

for sym in symbols:
    df = fetcher.load_cached\(sym\)
    if df is None:
        print\(f''{sym:12s} NO DATA''\)
        continue
    df = df.set_index\(''datetime''\)
    df = compute_signals\(df, signal_params\)

    # No BE raise
    bt = Backtester\(bt_params\)
    m = bt.run\(df\)[''metrics'']

    # With BE raise
    bt2 = Backtester\(bt_params_be\)
    m2 = bt2.run\(df\)[''metrics'']

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
from signals.four_pillars import compute_signals
from engine.backtester import Backtester

# Fetch 5m candles for all 5 coins \(24h = 288 candles each, 1 page\)
symbols = [''BTCUSDT'', ''ETHUSDT'', ''SOLUSDT'', ''MEMEUSDT'', ''RIVERUSDT'']
cache_dir = Path\(''data/cache''\)
end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
start = end - timedelta\(hours=24\)
start_ms = int\(start.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)
end_ms = int\(end.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)

url = ''https://api.bybit.com/v5/market/kline''
cols = [''timestamp'', ''open'', ''high'', ''low'', ''close'', ''volume'', ''turnover'']

signal_params = {
    ''atr_length'': 14, ''cross_level'': 25, ''zone_level'': 30,
    ''stage_lookback'': 10, ''allow_b_trades'': True, ''allow_c_trades'': True,
    ''b_open_fresh'': True, ''cloud2_reentry'': True, ''reentry_lookback'': 10,
}
bt_params = {
    ''sl_mult'': 1.0, ''tp_mult'': 1.5, ''cooldown'': 3, ''b_open_fresh'': True,
    ''be_raise_amount'': 0, ''cost_per_side'': 6.0, ''rebate_pct'': 0.70,
    ''settlement_hour_utc'': 17,
}
bt_params_be = dict\(bt_params, be_raise_amount=2.0\)

print\(f''Fetching 5m candles...''\)
print\(\)
print\(f''{""Symbol"":12s} {""Trades"":>6s} {""WR"":>6s} {""Exp"":>8s} {""P&L"":>10s} {""Comm"":>8s} {""LSG"":>5s} | {""Trades"":>6s} {""WR"":>6s} {""Exp"":>8s} {""P&L"":>10s} {""BE#"":>5s}''\)
print\(f''{"""":12s} {""--- No BE Raise ---"":^42s} | {""--- With BE +$2 ---"":^38s}''\)
print\(''-'' * 105\)

for sym in symbols:
    # Fetch 5m
    params = {''category'': ''linear'', ''symbol'': sym, ''interval'': ''5'', ''start'': str\(start_ms\), ''end'': str\(end_ms\), ''limit'': ''1000''}
    resp = requests.get\(url, params=params, timeout=15\)
    data = resp.json\(\)
    candles = data.get\(''result'', {}\).get\(''list'', []\)
    
    if not candles:
        print\(f''{sym:12s} NO DATA''\)
        continue

    df = pd.DataFrame\(candles, columns=cols\)
    df[''timestamp''] = pd.to_numeric\(df[''timestamp'']\)
    for col in [''open'', ''high'', ''low'', ''close'', ''volume'', ''turnover'']:
        df[col] = pd.to_numeric\(df[col], errors=''coerce''\)
    df = df.rename\(columns={''volume'': ''base_vol'', ''turnover'': ''quote_vol''}\)
    df[''datetime''] = pd.to_datetime\(df[''timestamp''], unit=''ms'', utc=True\)
    df = df.sort_values\(''timestamp''\).reset_index\(drop=True\)
    df = df.set_index\(''datetime''\)

    # Compute signals and backtest
    df = compute_signals\(df, signal_params\)

    m2 = bt2.run\(df\)[''metrics'']

    print\(f''{sym:12s} {m[""total_trades""]:6d} {m[""win_rate""]:5.1%} {m[""expectancy""]:>7.2f} {m[""net_pnl""]:>9.2f} {m[""total_commission""]:>7.2f} {m[""pct_losers_saw_green""]:4.0%} | {m2[""total_trades""]:6d} {m2[""win_rate""]:5.1%} {m2[""expectancy""]:>7.2f} {m2[""net_pnl""]:>9.2f} {m2[""be_raised_count""]:5d}''\)

from data.fetcher import BybitFetcher
from signals.four_pillars import compute_signals
from engine.backtester import Backtester
import requests, time, pandas as pd, numpy as np
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

fetcher = BybitFetcher\(cache_dir=''data/cache''\)
symbols = [''BTCUSDT'', ''ETHUSDT'', ''SOLUSDT'', ''MEMEUSDT'', ''RIVERUSDT'']
be_levels = [0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10]

signal_params = {
    ''atr_length'': 14, ''cross_level'': 25, ''zone_level'': 30,
    ''stage_lookback'': 10, ''allow_b_trades'': True, ''allow_c_trades'': True,
    ''b_open_fresh'': True, ''cloud2_reentry'': True, ''reentry_lookback'': 10,
}

def run_sweep\(sym, df, be_levels\):
    results = []
    for be in be_levels:
        bt = Backtester\({
            ''sl_mult'': 1.0, ''tp_mult'': 1.5, ''cooldown'': 3, ''b_open_fresh'': True,
            ''be_raise_amount'': float\(be\), ''cost_per_side'': 6.0, ''rebate_pct'': 0.70,
            ''settlement_hour_utc'': 17,
        }\)
        m = bt.run\(df\)[''metrics'']
        results.append\(m\)
    return results

def print_table\(title, symbols_data\):
    print\(f''\\n{title}''\)
    print\(''='' * 95\)
    print\(f''{''Symbol'':12s}  {''BE$0'':>12s}  {''BE$2'':>12s}  {''BE$4'':>12s}  {''BE$6'':>12s}  {''BE$8'':>12s}  {''BE$10'':>12s}''\)
    print\(''-'' * 95\)
    for sym, results in symbols_data:
        line = f''{sym:12s}''
        for m in results:
            line += f''  {m[""net_pnl""]:>6.0f}/{m[""win_rate""]:3.0%}/{m[""expectancy""]:>5.1f}''
        print\(line\)
    print\(f''{'''':12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}  {''P&L/WR/Exp'':>12s}''\)

# 1m candles
data_1m = []
for sym in symbols:
    df = fetcher.load_cached\(sym\)
    if df is None: continue
    df = df.set_index\(''datetime''\)
    df = compute_signals\(df, signal_params\)
    data_1m.append\(\(sym, run_sweep\(sym, df, be_levels\)\)\)

print_table\(''1m CANDLES - BE Raise Sweep \(24h bearish\)'', data_1m\)

# 5m candles
url = ''https://api.bybit.com/v5/market/kline''
end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
start = end - timedelta\(hours=24\)
start_ms = int\(start.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)
end_ms = int\(end.timestamp\(\) * 1000\)

data_5m = []
for sym in symbols:
    params = {''category'': ''linear'', ''symbol'': sym, ''interval'': ''5'', ''start'': str\(start_ms\), ''end'': str\(end_ms\), ''limit'': ''1000''}
    resp = requests.get\(url, params=params, timeout=15\)
    candles = resp.json\(\).get\(''result'', {}\).get\(''list'', []\)
    if not candles: continue
    cols = [''timestamp'', ''open'', ''high'', ''low'', ''close'', ''volume'', ''turnover'']
    df = pd.DataFrame\(candles, columns=cols\)
    df[''timestamp''] = pd.to_numeric\(df[''timestamp'']\)
    for col in [''open'', ''high'', ''low'', ''close'', ''volume'', ''turnover'']:
        df[col] = pd.to_numeric\(df[col], errors=''coerce''\)
    df = df.rename\(columns={''volume'': ''base_vol'', ''turnover'': ''quote_vol''}\)
    df[''datetime''] = pd.to_datetime\(df[''timestamp''], unit=''ms'', utc=True\)
    df = df.sort_values\(''timestamp''\).reset_index\(drop=True\).set_index\(''datetime''\)
    df = compute_signals\(df, signal_params\)
    data_5m.append\(\(sym, run_sweep\(sym, df, be_levels\)\)\)
    time.sleep\(0.15\)

print_table\(''5m CANDLES - BE Raise Sweep \(24h bearish\)'', data_5m\)

print\(''\\nFormat: P&L / Win Rate / Expectancy per trade''\)
print\(''All P&L before 70%% rebate credit''\)
")
